title: DragN's Livestock Overhaul!
description: An overhaul for livestock & farm animals!
body:
# Welcome to DragN’s Livestock Overhaul!

Livestock Overhaul is a survival-friendly mod that converts vanilla farm animals into more complex models and textures, along with a wide array of new features for them.



### New features include: 

-New animal colors, patterns and genetics

-Better drops, such as new cuts of meat

-New food items, such as cow, sheep, and llama cheese, and fish oil

-Donkey & mule armor-ability

-Horse chest-ability 

-New ‘Netherite Horse Armor’

-Horse, mule & donkey ‘Ground Tie’ ability when saddled and carpet ‘blankets’

-Horses, mules and donkeys have emotes, such as Bow and Piaffe

-Animals have genders (configurable) that affect how they breed and bi-product production



_Animals are converted automatically by the mod, and will spawn with random variants._



## Included Animals:



-Horses

-Donkeys

-Mules

-Cows

-Pigs

-Sheep

-Rabbits

-Llamas

-Cod

-Salmon

-Bees

-Goats

-Camels

-Undead Horses


Jump in and explore better, more robust animals with the **Livestock Overhaul!**

Thank you to Buu and FrostedWyvern for animations, and EvangeliX for code help!
 

**Discord:** https://discord.gg/2WznNTtVac

Q: Animations won't play or aren't playing correctly?

A: This is actually a Geckolib issue. Try turning off your Entity Shadows in both your game options and your shader options, especially if you're using a shader loader like Iris. You can also try turning off the Iris/ Oculus Geckolib Compat mod if you're on 1.20.1. We can't fix this issue on our end unfortunately.


Other questions? Try the Wiki, it may help! :)

https://github.com/DragN0007/Overhauled-Livestock/wiki

 

Just Peachy did a video review over Livestock Overhaul! If you'd like to learn more about the mod, I'd recommend checking her video out!

https://youtu.be/zMEyZI1jZuc?si=aaoD3RyB70mkY58V

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
